title: New Play Feature
content: Create teams with randomizer. After games, players can vote on a MOTM. Player with most votes will receive a MOTM card and +10 OVR!

title: New Player Stats | Enhanced Rating
content: We've added some new player stats: Vision, Stamina, Touch, Work Rate, and Mindset! When you go to rate a player, your previous stat votes will be shown.

title: New Goals and Assist Tracker
content: You can now track your goals and assist for each pickup game. This will show on your player card under performance stats!

title: Initial Release
content: Welcome boys to Los N1g@hz Ultimate Team! Track player stats, vote on ratings, and build your dream team.
